case_title: YICK PING C. VS AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY YICK PING C. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YICK PING C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,008.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO.
